---
title: "Sports Analytics Final Project"
author: "Alex Lewis"
format: pdf
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(stringr)
library(lme4)
library(splines)

soccer_data <- read_csv("project_data/combined_seasons.csv")
soccer_data$`Avg Mins per Match` <- soccer_data$`Avg Mins per Match` / 
  soccer_data$`Matches Played`
soccer_data <- soccer_data %>%
  mutate(`Total Mins` = `Matches Played` * `Avg Mins per Match`) %>%
  rename(
    `Passes into Final Third`      = `1/3`,
    `Goals per 90`                 = `Goals p 90`,
    `Assists per 90`               = `Assists p 90`,
    `Shots per 90`                 = `Shots p 90`,
    `Expected Goals (xG)`          = `Expected Goals`,
    `Non-Penalty xG`               = `Exp NPG`,
    `Shot Creating Actions per 90` = `Shot creating actions p 90`,
    `Goal Creating Actions per 90` = `Goal creating actions p 90`,
    `Goals per Shot`               = `Goals per shot`,
    `Goals per Shot on Target`     = `Goals per shot on target`,
    `Tackles Attempted`            = `Tackles attempted`,
    `Shots Blocked`                = `Shots blocked`,
    `Passes Blocked`               = `Passes blocked`,
    `Dribble Tackle Success %`     = `% Dribbles tackled`,
    `Pass Completion %`            = `Pass completion %`,
    `Key Passes`                   = `Key passes`,
    `Progressive Pass Distance`    = `Progressive passes distance`,
    `Passes into Penalty Area`     = `Passes into penalty area`,
    `Take-Ons Attempted`           = `Take ons attempted`,
    `Successful Take-On %`         = `% Successful take-ons`,
    `Carries into Final Third`     = `carries final 3rd`,
    `Carries into Penalty Area`    = `carries penalty area`,
    `Possessions Lost`             = `Possessions lost`,
    `Aerial Duel Win %`            = `% Aerial Duels won`
  )
soccer_data <- soccer_data %>%
  mutate(comp = str_trim(comp),
         comp = recode(comp,
           "eng Premier League" = "Premier League",
           "de Bundesliga"      = "Bundesliga",
           "es La Liga"         = "La Liga",
           "fr Ligue 1"         = "Ligue 1",
           "it Serie A"         = "Serie A"
         ))
soccer_data <- na.omit(soccer_data)
```

```{r}
gks <- soccer_data %>% filter(str_detect(pos, "GK"))
outfielders <- soccer_data %>% filter(!str_detect(pos, "GK"))
outfielders <- outfielders %>% filter(`Total Mins` >= 450)
defenders <- outfielders %>%
  filter(str_detect(pos, "DF")) %>%
  rename(
    `Touches in Defensive Penalty Area` = touches_def_pen,
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Interceptions per 90` = Interceptions / `Total Mins` * 90,
    `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` = `Progressive Pass Distance` / `Total Mins` * 90,
    `Passes Blocked per 90` =
      `Passes Blocked` / `Total Mins` * 90
  ) %>%
  select(
    -`Non-Penalty xG`,
    -carries_prgc,
    -`Goals Against`,
    -`Goals against p 90`,
    -`Saves`,
    -`Saves %`,
    -`Clean Sheets`,
    -`% Clean sheets`,
    -`% Penalty saves`
  )
colnames(defenders)
```


```{r}
length(unique(defenders$player))
```


































```{r}
defender_stats <- c(
  # defensive
  "Tackles Attempted",
  "Tackles Won",
  "Dribble Tackle Success %",
  "Shots Blocked",
  "Passes Blocked",
  "Interceptions",
  "Clearances",
  "Errors made",
  "Aerial Duel Win %",
  "Crosses Stopped",
  "Touches in Defensive Penalty Area",
  
  # ball-playing / possession
  "Pass Completion %",
  "Progressive Pass Distance",
  "Progressive Passes",
  "Passes into Final Third",
  "Passes into Penalty Area",
  "Progressive Carries",
  "Carries into Final Third",
  "Carries into Penalty Area",
  "Possessions Lost",
  
  # attacking contribution
  "Goals per 90",
  "Assists per 90",
  "Expected Goals (xG)",
  "Shots per 90",
  "Shot Creating Actions per 90",
  "Goal Creating Actions per 90"
)

df_stints <- defenders %>%
  arrange(player, season) %>%
  group_by(player) %>%
  mutate(
    player_stint_id = cumsum(comp != lag(comp, default = first(comp)))
  ) %>%
  group_by(player, player_stint_id, comp) %>%
  summarise(
    seasons    = n(),
    total_mins = sum(`Total Mins`, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_age    = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),

    across(
      all_of(defender_stats),
      ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),

    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(total_mins >= 450) %>%
  group_by(player) %>%
  filter(n() >= 2) %>%
  ungroup()

df_transfers <- df_stints %>%
  arrange(player, player_stint_id) %>%
  group_by(player) %>%
  mutate(
    from_league = lag(comp),
    to_league   = comp,
    from_id     = lag(player_stint_id)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(from_league),
    from_league != to_league
  )

df_stints_pre <- df_stints %>%
  select(
    player,
    player_stint_id,
    seasons,
    total_mins,
    all_of(defender_stats)
  ) %>%
  rename(
    seasons_pre = seasons,
    total_mins_pre = total_mins
  ) %>%
  rename_with(
    ~ paste0(.x, "_pre"),
    all_of(defender_stats)
  )

df_stints_post <- df_stints %>%
  select(
    player,
    player_stint_id,
    seasons,
    total_mins,
    all_of(defender_stats)
  ) %>%
  rename(
    seasons_post = seasons,
    total_mins_post = total_mins
  ) %>%
  rename_with(
    ~ paste0(.x, "_post"),
    all_of(defender_stats)
  )

df_transfer_events <- df_transfers %>%
  left_join(
    df_stints_pre, by = c("player", "from_id" = "player_stint_id")) %>%
  left_join(
    df_stints_post, by = c("player", "player_stint_id")
  )

for (stat in defender_stats) {
  pre_col  <- paste0(stat, "_pre")
  post_col <- paste0(stat, "_post")
  if (
    pre_col %in% names(df_transfer_events) &
    post_col %in% names(df_transfer_events)
  ) {
    df_transfer_events[[paste0(stat, "_delta")]] <-
      df_transfer_events[[post_col]] -
      df_transfer_events[[pre_col]]
  }
}

df_transfer_events <- df_transfer_events %>%
  select(
    player,
    from_league,
    to_league,
    avg_age,
    seasons_pre,
    seasons_post,
    total_mins_pre,
    total_mins_post,
    ends_with("_pre"),
    ends_with("_post"),
    ends_with("_delta")
  )

delta_cols <- grep("_delta$", names(df_transfer_events), value = TRUE)

df_transfer_events <- df_transfer_events %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(delta_cols),
      ~ as.numeric(scale(.x)),
      .names = "{.col}_z"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
df_transfer_events %>%
  count(from_league, to_league) %>%
  ggplot(aes(from_league,to_league,fill=n)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label=n), color = "white", size = 5) +
  scale_fill_gradient() +
  labs(
    title="Observed Defender Transfers 2020-2025",
    x="Origin League",
    y="Destination League"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
m_int <- lmer(`Interceptions per 90` ~ age + `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   `Aerial Duel Win %` + comp + (1|player) + (1|squad), data=defenders)
summary(m_int)

m_key <- lmer(
  `Key Passes per 90` ~ age +
    `Pass Completion %` +
    `Progressive Pass Distance per 90` +
    comp +
    (1|player) + (1|squad),
  data = defenders
)

m_aerial <- lmer(
  `Aerial Duel Win %` ~ age +
    `Interceptions per 90` +
    `Passes Blocked per 90` +
    comp +
    (1|player) + (1|squad),
  data = defenders
)
```

```{r}
newdat <- expand.grid(
  age = mean(defenders$age),
  `Dribble Tackle Success %` = mean(defenders$`Dribble Tackle Success %`),
  `Aerial Duel Win %` = mean(defenders$`Aerial Duel Win %`),
  comp = unique(defenders$comp)
)

newdat$pred <- predict(m_int, newdata = newdat, re.form = NA)
print(newdat)

deltas <- expand_grid(
  from_league = newdat$comp,
  to_league = newdat$comp
) %>%
  left_join(
    newdat %>% select(comp,pred),
    by = c("from_league"="comp")
  ) %>%
  rename(pred_from = pred) %>%
  left_join(
    newdat %>% select(comp,pred),
    by = c("to_league"="comp")
  ) %>%
  rename(pred_to = pred) %>%
  mutate(
    delta = pred_to - pred_from
  )

ggplot(
  deltas,
  aes(from_league,to_league,fill=delta)
) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label=round(delta,2)),
            color="white",
            size=5) +
  scale_fill_gradient2() +
  labs(
    title="Predicted Change in Interceptions per 90 After League Switch",
    x="Origin League",
    y="Destination League"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

VarCorr(m_int)
```

```{r}
m_null <- update(
  m_int,
  . ~ . - comp
)

anova(
  m_null,
  m_int
)

m_age_linear <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   `Aerial Duel Win %` +
   `Passes Blocked per 90` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

m_age_quad <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age + I(age^2) +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   `Aerial Duel Win %` +
   `Passes Blocked per 90` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

anova(m_age_linear, m_age_quad)

m0 <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

m1 <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

m2 <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   `Aerial Duel Win %` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

m3 <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   `Aerial Duel Win %` +
   `Passes Blocked per 90` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

m4 <- lmer(
 `Interceptions per 90` ~
   age +
   `Dribble Tackle Success %` +
   `Aerial Duel Win %` +
   `Passes Blocked per 90` +
   `Expected Goals (xG)` +
   comp +
   (1|player) +
   (1|squad),
 data=defenders
)

AIC(m0,m1,m2,m3,m4)
anova(m0,m1,m2,m3,m4)

m_fixed_only <- lm(
`Interceptions per 90` ~ age +
`Dribble Tackle Success %` +
`Aerial Duel Win %` +
`Passes Blocked per 90` +
comp,
data = defenders
)

m_player_re <- lmer(
`Interceptions per 90` ~ age +
`Dribble Tackle Success %` +
`Aerial Duel Win %` +
`Passes Blocked per 90` +
comp +
(1|player),
data = defenders,
REML = FALSE
)

m_squad_re <- lmer(
`Interceptions per 90` ~ age +
`Dribble Tackle Success %` +
`Aerial Duel Win %` +
`Passes Blocked per 90` +
comp +
(1|squad),
data = defenders,
REML = FALSE
)

m_player_squad_re <- lmer(
`Interceptions per 90` ~ age +
`Dribble Tackle Success %` +
`Aerial Duel Win %` +
`Passes Blocked per 90` +
comp +
(1|player) + (1|squad),
data = defenders,
REML = FALSE
)

AIC(m_fixed_only, m_player_re, m_squad_re, m_player_squad_re)
anova(m_player_re, m_player_squad_re)
anova(m_squad_re, m_player_squad_re)
```
```
